BLOCK stealth-spec (StealthConfig has no consumers) — RESOLVED: home_screen.dart:43 uses fakeName for title; session_screen.dart:107 hides branding on sessionScreenStealth; notification_service.dart consumes notificationDisguise + fakeName

BLOCK model-spec (FakeCallConfig defaults / missing fields) — RESOLVED: declineIsSafe default TRUE (step_config.dart:558); added callStyle, callerPhotoPath, voiceOutputMode, ringDurationSeconds, declineWithDistressHoldSeconds, blackScreenMode. retryCount removed.

findings.issue: SessionMode still missing spec fields iconName (HiveField 2), isFromTemplate (HiveField 4), maxPauseDuration (HiveField 8). checkInType is still stored as an independent field rather than derived from chainSteps[0].
findings.suggested_fix: Add iconName/isFromTemplate/maxPauseDuration; derive checkInType from chainSteps.first.type (compute-on-read getter) so the two cannot drift.

findings.issue: StealthConfig defaults still diverge from spec §StealthConfig (D-UX-6, D-UX-7). Impl defaults fakeName='Calendar', fakeIcon=StealthIconPreset.calendar, notificationDisguise=true, timerDisplay=bool false, sessionScreenStealth=true. Spec defaults: fakeName='Music', fakeIcon=bool false, notificationDisguise=false, timerDisplay=enum normal, sessionScreenStealth=false. Either impl is the new truth (promote to spec) or spec is the truth (revert).
findings.suggested_fix: Make a decision: either (a) update spec + decisions log to codify Calendar-first defaults and timerDisplay as bool, or (b) migrate impl to spec (StealthTimerDisplay enum, Music defaults). Don't leave both in conflict.

findings.issue: Still no golden tests for RTL layouts (ar/fa/he). Flutter auto-mirrors under MaterialApp, but visual regressions can go unnoticed without goldens. Unchanged from prior pass.
findings.suggested_fix: Add Directionality-wrapping goldens for home_screen + session_screen in ar/fa/he under test/goldens/.

findings.issue: Layer 1/2 sim defense is present (orchestrator skips executeReal when isSimulation; per-service isSimulation parameter). Layer 3/4 (platform channel no-op / native guards) still not golden-tested — no integration test asserts MessagingService/PhoneService/Android SmsWorker receive zero dispatches. Unchanged from prior pass.
findings.suggested_fix: Add an integration test driving a full simulated session and asserting the three recorded-call counts on Fake* services stay at zero for any real-world side effect (SMS enqueue, phone dial, alarm play).

findings.issue: Deliberate Phase-3 deviations still not promoted to spec. BatteryAlertConfig (enabled=true/threshold=15), GpsLoggingConfig (intervalSeconds=60/accuracy=medium/format=dms), StealthConfig (Calendar instead of Music) all differ from docs/spec/03-data-models.md.
findings.suggested_fix: Promote deliberate deviations into spec with rationale citations (decisions-log.md entries) OR revert impl to match spec so there's a single source of truth.

findings.issue: 31 screen files vs spec §Route Map listing ~29 routes. Spec's '26+ screens' coverage is met; extras are distressChains/distressChainEditor (first-class management surfaces). Unchanged from prior pass.
findings.suggested_fix: No action required — coverage is complete.

findings.issue: EnginePaused.reason still includes fakeCallAnswered + bootRestart (engine_state.dart:106,111) which are not enumerated in spec §PauseReason (which lists manual, incomingCall). userRequested vs manual naming mismatch also unresolved.
findings.suggested_fix: Update spec's PauseReason enum to include fakeCallAnswered + bootRestart; align naming (userRequested in both spec and code).

positive_checks: ChainEvent enum now has 13 values including reminderFired, pauseExpired, stepExecutionFailed; all emission points verified.
SmsContactStrategy correctly filters contacts by config.channel (D-DATA-7 / Extra-15/15b).
StealthConfig wired in three consumers (session_screen, home_screen, notification_service).
FakeCallConfig matches spec (declineIsSafe=TRUE default; callStyle, callerPhotoPath, voiceOutputMode, ringDurationSeconds, declineWithDistressHoldSeconds, blackScreenMode present).
PhoneCallContactStrategy implements retry loop (step.retryCount + 1 attempts) and alternativeContactIds fallback.
LoudAlarmConfig / CallEmergencyConfig / HoldButtonConfig / DisguisedReminderConfig all carry spec-required fields with correct defaults.
Engine public API gained checkIn, earlyCheckIn, setSpeedMultiplier, restartCurrentStep (all present at session_engine.dart:404/421/431/453).
docs/decisions-log.md indexes D-STRATEGY-2, D-BACKUP-1, D-TELEMETRY-1, DRIFT-L8 (lines 2842, 2914, 2926, 1517).

4-layer simulation defense structurally intact: lib/services/simulation/** has ZERO platform-channel, url_launcher, geolocator, just_audio, battery_plus, flutter_local_notifications, home_widget, workmanager, permission_handler, share_plus, wakelock_plus, vibration, audio_session, flutter_tts, speech_to_text imports.
open_questions: SessionMode: add iconName/isFromTemplate/maxPauseDuration and derive checkInType from chainSteps[0], or defer to a post-alpha migration?
StealthConfig: is Calendar-first the new product truth (promote to spec) or a Phase-3 placeholder (revert to Music)?
PauseReason: add fakeCallAnswered + bootRestart to spec (and rename manual→userRequested), or rename back in code?
Sim-defense golden test: add now or defer? (Layer 1/2 in place, but no integration test locks Layer 3/4.)
